en-US: FAQ - English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth 2026

zh-TW: 志工招募 | 2026海外青年英語服務營
en-US: Volunteer Recruitment - English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth 2026
English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth 2026

zh-TW: 僑務委員會為使海外青年活動與時俱進，落實推動國際志工服務精神，鼓勵海外志工投入國內英語教學活動，2004年起與金車教育基金會合作辦理「尋找ABC史懷哲－海外華裔青年暑期返鄉英語教學志願服務」，邀請有服務意願之海外僑青來臺服務。 鑑於運用海外資源來臺投入志願服務活動，深具正面意義，並可配合政府人才培育計畫，鼓勵海外僑青投入國內英語教學活動，提昇偏遠或教學資源缺乏地區國小、國中學生及弱勢族群學習英語機會，本會與教育部於2006年共同規劃辦理「海外青年英語服務營」，活動為期4週，第1週教育訓練，第2、3週到校進行英語教學、第4週寶島參訪，由本會負責招募海外僑青來臺，教育部則負責志工教育訓練及在校英語教學服務。因辦理成效良好，逐年擴大辦理規模，2014年起並邀請客家委員會及民間NGO單位參與辦理，2016年原住民族委員會亦加入辦理行列。
en-US: The Overseas Community Affairs Council,R.O.C.(Taiwan) in order to make overseas youth activities to keep pace with the times, the implementation of the spirit of promoting international volunteerism, encourage overseas volunteers to invest in domestic English teaching activities, since 2004 and the Golden Car Education Foundation to cooperate in the organization of the "Looking for ABC Schweitzer - Overseas Chinese Youth Summer Returning to their hometowns to teach English Volunteer Service," inviting the service of the willingness of the overseas overseas Chinese young people to come to serve in Taiwan. In view of the use of overseas resources to Taiwan to participate in voluntary service activities, deeply positive meaning, and can be coordinated with the government's talent cultivation program to encourage overseas Chinese youth to participate in the domestic English teaching activities to enhance the remote or lack of teaching resources in areas of primary and secondary school students and underprivileged groups to learn English opportunities, this Association and the Ministry of Education in 2006 jointly planned to organize the "Overseas Young People's English Service Camp", the activities of the four-week period, the first week of educational The activity lasts for four weeks, the first week of educational training, the second and third weeks of English teaching in schools, and the fourth week of the visit to Treasure Island, with the Association being responsible for recruiting overseas overseas youth to come to Taiwan, and the Ministry of Education being responsible for the education and training of volunteers and English teaching services in schools. Due to the good results of the program, the scale of the program has been expanded year by year, and since 2014, the Hakka Affairs Council  and civil NGO units have been invited to participate in the program, and in 2016, the Council of Indigenous Peoples also joined the program.

zh-TW: 「2023年海外青年英語服務營」為響應「2030雙語政策」，於疫後首次擴大辦理規模，並擴大志工招募來源，開放臺灣華語文學習中心(TCML)及海外主流學校學生報名，計有549名僑青及74名TCML或海外主流學校學生參加，共有623名海外志工至國內94所國中、小學服務，含教育報國教署85校、客委會6校及原民會3校，國內有4,307名學童受益。截至目前計有6,467名海外志工來臺參加，國內計有逾46,000名學童受惠。
en-US: In response to the "2030 Bilingual Policy," the "2023 English Teaching Volunteer Service Program" expanded its scale for the first time after the epidemic and expanded the source of volunteer recruitment by opening up the application process to students from Taiwan Centers for Chinese Language Learning (TCML) and overseas mainstream schools, with 549 overseas Chinese youths and 74 students from TCML or overseas mainstream schools attending, and a total of 623 overseas volunteers providing services to 94 junior high schools and elementary schools in the country. A total of 623 overseas volunteers served in 94 primary and secondary schools in China, including 85 schools of the National Education Department of the Education Newspaper, 6 schools of the Hakka Committee and 3 schools of the Indigenous People's Association, benefiting 4,307 students in China. To date, 6,467 overseas volunteers have come to Taiwan to participate in the program, benefiting more than 46,000 children in Taiwan.

zh-TW: 本項活動成效卓著，廣受海內外好評，除成功引導海外青年投入臺灣志願服務外，亦使海外青年更貼近臺灣，與臺灣產生情感聯繫，達成促進國際青年交流、縮小國內城鄉差距、提升國內學童英語學習動機及創新僑教服務等多重目標。
en-US: This activity is highly effective and widely praised both at home and abroad, in addition to successfully guiding overseas youth to join the volunteer service in Taiwan, but also to make overseas youth closer to Taiwan, and Taiwan to generate emotional ties, to achieve multiple goals of promoting international youth exchanges, narrowing the gap between urban and rural areas in the countryside, enhancing the English learning motivation of the domestic schoolchildren, and innovating overseas Chinese education services.

zh-TW: 承辦單位：嚕拉拉旅行社有限公司
聯絡地址：新竹市北區演藝路27之1號
en-US: Address: No. 27-1, Yanyi Rd., North Dist., Hsinchu City 300026, Taiwan (R.O.C.)

zh-TW: 服務時間 : 週一至週五 上午 9:00~下午 06:00
在 Google 地圖中查看
臺北醫學大學信義校區
臺北市信義區吳興街250號
en-US: No. 250, Wuxing St., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110301, Taiwan (R.O.C.)

zh-TW: 我們機場接送的時間為臺灣時間上午9點(09:00)至下午5點(17:00)，謝謝。
en-US: Our airport pick-up and drop-off service is available from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Taiwan time. Thank you.

zh-TW:
如果您於7月4日已抵達臺北，但尚未找到當日住宿地點，我們已在劍潭海外青年活動中心預留了房間(但是房間數量有限)，我們將以先抵達先安排的原則進行分配，當天所產生的額外接機及住宿費用(使用者付費須自行負擔-可以與同住或先行抵達須需接機志工共同分攤)。
如果志工有須提前接機的需求，請致電陳先生(臺灣手機號碼)0935-261-165。
en-US:
If you have arrived in Taipei on July 4th but have not yet found accommodation for the day, we have reserved a room at the Chientan Overseas Youth Activity Center (but the number of rooms is limited). We will allocate rooms on a first-come, first-served basis. Any additional airport pick-up and accommodation costs incurred on the day will be borne by the user and can be shared with the volunteers who are staying with you or who have arrived earlier and require airport pick-up.
If volunteers require airport pickup in advance, please call Mr. Chen (Taiwan mobile number): 0935-261-165

zh-TW: 如果您的班機抵達時間晚於臺灣時間7月6日晚上5點(17:00) ，請在「海外志工報到調查表」載明您接機需求時間，我們將另作安排。
en-US: If your flight arrives after 5:00 PM (17:00) on July 6th, Taiwan time, please indicate your pick-up time in the "Overseas Volunteer Registration Survey Form" and we will make alternative arrangements.

zh-TW: 送機時間自7月31日早上8點(8:00)起至晚上6點(18:00)，由於人數眾多量能有限，我們將以海外志工為優先安排送機，恕無另受理海外志工家屬及朋友預訂送機安排服務。
en-US: Airport drop-off will be available from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on July 31st. Due to the large number of people and limited capacity, we will prioritize overseas volunteers for airport drop-off. We regret that we cannot accept reservations for airport drop-off arrangements from overseas volunteers' family members and friends.

zh-TW: 活動閉幕(結業)式，將於7月30日傍晚6點(18:00)前結束，親友可在閉幕(結業)式後或7月31日中午12點(12:00)前來劍潭青年活動中心接回海外志工，謝謝。
en-US: The closing ceremony will end at 6:00 PM on July 30th. Friends and family can pick up the overseas volunteers at the Chientan Youth Activity Center after the closing ceremony or at 12:00 PM on July 31st. Thank you.

zh-TW: 如果海外志工離臺的班機時間在7月31日中午之後，當天的餐飲(晚餐)需由海外志工自理。
en-US: If the departure flight of overseas volunteers is after noon on July 31, the overseas volunteers will need to arrange their own meals (dinner) on that day.

zh-TW: 如果海外志工離臺的班機時間在8月1日之後(或者更晚)，我們將協助安排住宿及餐飲及送機交通，相關費用(使用者付費須自行負擔-由我們安排與同性別志工同寢室)。
en-US: If the overseas volunteers' departure flight is after August 1st (or later), we will assist in arranging accommodation, meals, and airport transportation. The related costs (users will have to pay for themselves - we will arrange for them to share a room with volunteers of the same gender) will be borne by the users themselves.

zh-TW: 在教育訓練週(7月4日至10日)期間，主要安排於臺北醫學大學餐廳(桌餐方式)用餐，如有對特定食材過敏或特殊飲食(如豬肉、雞肉等)需求敬請提前告知，我們將提供素食與葷食兩種選擇另外安排。
en-US: During the week of Education Training, the participants will primarily dine at Taipei Medical University restaurant (table service). If you have any food allergies or special dietary needs (such as pork, chicken, etc.), please inform us in advance. We will provide both vegetarian and meat options for separate arrangements.

zh-TW: 在校服務週(7月11至24日)飲食由服務學校統一安排。
en-US: During the week of School Service, food will be arranged by service school.

zh-TW: 在寶島參訪週(7月25至29日)飲食安排將會在旅遊行程中安排在地特色美食(特殊飲食另外安排)。
en-US: During the week of Taiwan Tourism(7/25~7/29), the participants will have the opportunity to sample local delicacies during the tour (special meals will be arranged separately)

zh-TW: 活動自7月4日報到當天晚餐起至7月30日閉幕(結業)式晚餐止，期間我們將提供每日三餐(在校服務週亦會由學校師長安排)。
en-US: The event will run from dinner on the day of registration, July 4th, to dinner at the closing ceremony, July 30th. During this period, we will provide three meals a day (the school's teachers and staff will also arrange meals during the week of School Service).

zh-TW: 我們會贈送每位志工2件團體制服(上衣)，於7月4日報到時依志工報名表所填尺寸領取，如有尺寸不合只能在所有志工報到後與其他志工或不會來報到的志工交換。
en-US: We will give each volunteer two group uniforms (shirts), which can be picked up on July 4th when you register, according to the size filled in on the volunteer registration form. If the size is not right, you can only exchange with other volunteers or volunteers who will not come to register after all the volunteers have registered.

zh-TW: 活動時間自7月4日至7月30日，營期時間長，且第一週教育訓練結束後及第三週和寶島旅遊週都必須志工自行搬運行李，攜帶太多物品只會讓志工更辛苦，建議攜帶4-5套換洗衣服即可。
en-US: The event will run from July 4th to July 30th. The camp is quite long, and volunteers will have to carry their own luggage after the first week of training, as well as during the third week and the Taiwan Tourism Week. Carrying too many items will only make things more difficult for the volunteers, so it is recommended to bring 4-5 sets of clothes to change into.

zh-TW: 第一週教育訓練週6天都須穿著團體制服，第二、三週則依學校規定(往年也是14天都須穿團體制服)，第四週寶島旅遊我們會開放3天穿著自己的便服，可以開放穿短褲，其他時段(特別是始業式和結業式)請配合穿著長褲。
en-US: During the first week of training, students must wear the group uniform for all six days. During the second and third weeks, the school's regulations apply (in previous years, students have also had to wear the group uniform for 14 days). During the fourth week of the Taiwan Tourism Week, students are allowed to wear their own casual clothes for three days, including shorts. At other times (especially the opening and closing ceremonies), please wear long pants.

zh-TW: 教育訓練週和寶島參訪週原則上志工4-6人一間房，我們有準備盥洗包(小毛巾、牙膏、牙刷、香皂、梳子、外袋)每人一份，飯店房間也有沐浴乳、洗髮精及吹風機。
en-US: During the Education and Training Week and the Taiwan Tourism Week, volunteers are generally divided into groups of 4-6 per room. We provide toiletries (small towel, toothpaste, toothbrush, soap, comb, and outer bag) for each person. The hotel rooms also provide shower gel, shampoo, and hair dryer.

zh-TW: 學校教學兩週住宿依學校安排各校不盡相同，有的學校住在學校裡面，有的住飯店、民宿或學生家長家裡(home stay)，但不管住哪裡，學校有老師或警衛在，飯店和民宿也有服務人員，老師們都會留電話給志工，老師們和承辦單位相關工作人員手機都是24小時不關機的。臺灣暑假酷熱，除了高山地區少用冷氣外，其他地區的學校教室和住宿地點幾乎都有冷氣。
en-US: Accommodation during the two-week school term varies from school to school. Some schools provide accommodation on campus, while others offer rooms in hotels, guesthouses, or homestays. Regardless of the accommodation, schools have teachers or security guards present, and hotels and guesthouses have staff. Teachers leave their phone numbers with volunteers, and teachers and relevant staff from the organizing unit keep their phones on 24/7. Summer in Taiwan is very hot, and except for high-altitude areas where air conditioning is less used, classrooms and accommodations in most other areas are air-conditioned.

zh-TW: 盥洗包的物品(如牙膏、毛巾、香皂等)都足夠使用1個月，學校也有經費可以提供沐浴乳和洗髮精等生活用品。
en-US: The toiletries kit contains enough items (such as toothpaste, towel, soap, etc.) for one month, and the school also has funds to provide daily necessities such as shower gel and shampoo.

zh-TW: 第一週在臺北醫學大學有提供網路使用，第2.3週就要視每個學校的狀況，通常學校都會有網路(至少會有有線網路)，第4週寶島參訪旅遊只有飯店才有提供網路。
en-US: Internet access is available at Taipei Medical University during the first week. In the second and third weeks, it depends on the situation at each school. Usually, schools will have internet access (at least wired). During the fourth week of the Taiwan tour, only hotels will provide internet access.

zh-TW: 如果真的需要申辦網路卡，我們已經幫志工接洽中華電信公司，該公司會特別為本次海外志工派人前往研習場地開設申辦網卡櫃臺，並推出「海外青年專案」15天30G免費網卡，30G用完降速為5mb，可持續儲值使用，卡片金額用完即可取消，因為是為海外青年專案，需準備護照正本(中華電信需掃描護照正本)才能申辦，恕不接受臺灣身分證或健保卡辦理。此項服務為免費提供，因志工人數眾多，請於「海外志工報到調查表」中華電信調查連結中先行填具，以便於7月4日報到當天領取作業。
en-US: If you really need to apply for a data SIM card, we have already contacted Chunghwa Telecom on behalf of the volunteers. Chunghwa Telecom will send someone to the training venue specifically for these overseas volunteers to set up a data SIM card application counter and offer a "Overseas Youth Project"—a 15-day, 30GB free data SIM card. After the 30GB is used up, the speed will be reduced to 5Mbps. You can continue to use the card by topping up the balance, and you can cancel the card once the balance is used up. Because this is an overseas youth project, you need to prepare your original passport (Chunghwa Telecom will scan the original passport) to apply. We regret that we do not accept Taiwan ID cards or National Health Insurance cards. This service is provided free of charge. Due to the large number of volunteers, please fill out the "Overseas Volunteer Registration Survey Form" in advance via the Chunghwa Telecom survey link so that you can pick up your application on the registration day, July 4th.

zh-TW: 因開通需要向入出境管理局確認入出境紀錄，因此若您申請本專案且擁有多本護照(包含中華民國(臺灣)的護照)，請在離開僑居國以及入境中華民國(臺灣)時，務必使用相同的僑居國護照。
en-US: Because the activation requires confirmation of entry and exit records with the Immigration Bureau, if you apply for this program and have multiple passports (including a Republic of China (Taiwan) passport), please be sure to use the same passport from your country of residence when leaving your country of residence and when entering the Republic of China (Taiwan).

zh-TW: 注意：僑民役男不適用本專案，詳情請參閱僑民役男相關說明。
en-US: Note: This program does not apply to overseas conscripts. Please refer to the relevant instructions for overseas conscripts for details.

zh-TW: 除了7月4日及7月31日提供接/送機交通接駁服務外，7月10日教育訓練週結束後學校會安排交通接送至各校，北部地區學校會派車接送，中南部地區大部分同縣市學校會共乘大巴士，更遠的會搭乘臺灣高鐵。離島的學校已經替服務志工準備好志工的機票。7月27日學校會再將志工送至寶島旅遊集合地點，搭乘大巴士參加旅遊參訪活動，活動期間皆由主辦單位提供交通接送。
en-US: In addition to providing airport shuttle services on July 4th and July 31st, schools will arrange transportation to each school after the training week ends on July 10th. Schools in the northern region will provide their own buses, while most schools in the central and southern regions will share buses, and those further away will use the Taiwan High Speed ​​Rail. Schools on outlying islands have already prepared airfares for their volunteers. On July 27th, schools will transport volunteers to the designated meeting point for a tour of Taiwan, where they will board buses to participate in sightseeing activities. Transportation will be provided by the organizers throughout the activities.

zh-TW: 在學校教學服務前間的週末假日，學校老師會安排旅遊或城市探索活動，其他週一到週五教學結束後，志工應該會忙著準備隔天的教案和課程，沒有時間可以離開學校探索城市，也為了志工的安全，避免離開學校，謝謝。
en-US: On weekends and holidays before the school's teaching service, the school teachers will arrange outings or city exploration activities. On other days, from Monday to Friday after the teaching service, volunteers will be busy preparing lesson plans and courses for the next day and will not have time to leave the school to explore the city. For the safety of the volunteers, please avoid leaving the school. Thank you.

zh-TW: 活動期間7月4日至7月30日謝絕在臺親朋好友探視志工，因為活動行程滿滿，教育訓練週到晚上9點皆有課程，教學服務兩週週一至周五都要準備隔日教案和課程，週末學校皆有安排小旅行活動，依據往年的經驗，比較有經驗(來過1-2次)的志工，晚上備課通常最早晚上8點結束，第一次參加的志工，有時候會備課到晚上10-11點，如果親友晚上到學校探視，恐怕更會耽誤志工備課和休息的時間。
en-US: During the event period from July 4th to July 30th, visits from relatives and friends in Taiwan to volunteers are not permitted. The event schedule is packed, with training sessions until 9 pm every night. For the two weeks of teaching service, volunteers need to prepare lesson plans and courses for the next day from Monday to Friday. The school also arranges short trips on weekends. Based on past experience, more experienced volunteers (who have participated 1-2 times) usually finish preparing lessons at the earliest by 8 pm. Volunteers participating for the first time sometimes prepare lessons until 10-11 pm. If relatives and friends visit the school in the evening, it will likely further delay the volunteers' preparation and rest time.

zh-TW: 7月30日結業式因為志工人數眾多，還有學校師長要參加，座位區有限，不建議邀請眾多親朋好友前來觀禮，謝謝。
en-US: Due to the large number of volunteers and school teachers attending the graduation ceremony on July 30th, and the limited seating area, we do not recommend inviting many relatives and friends to attend. Thank you.

zh-TW: 僑民役男定義：年滿19歲~36歲之間，並同時持有中華民國(臺灣)護照與僑居國護照，以及在中華民國(臺灣)持有戶籍的男性。(簡單判定根據：請確認您的中華民國(臺灣)護照上是否有「身分證字號」欄位，若有，即代表您持有臺灣戶籍。)
en-US: Definition of overseas conscripts: Males aged 19 to 36 who simultaneously hold a Republic of China (Taiwan) passport and a passport of their country of residence, and who are registered residents of the Republic of China (Taiwan). (Simple criterion: Please check if your Republic of China (Taiwan) passport has an "Identity Card Number" field. If it does, it means you hold Taiwanese household registration.)

zh-TW: 若您持有僑民役男身分，請使用中華民國(臺灣)護照入境與出境。(由於中華電信提供的海外青年網路專案須使用僑居國護照出入境，因此僑民役男不適用該網路專案)
en-US: If you hold overseas conscript status, please use your Republic of China (Taiwan) passport for entry and exit. (Since the overseas youth internet service provided by Chunghwa Telecom requires the use of your country of residence passport for entry and exit, overseas conscripts are not eligible for this internet service.)

zh-TW: 若您本次入境前未申請過出境許可與出境核准，出境前須重新申請：
en-US: If you did not apply for an exit permit and exit approval before this entry, you must reapply before departure:

zh-TW: 向僑委會申請役政用華僑身分證明書
en-US: Apply to the Overseas Community Affairs Council for a Certificate of Overseas Chinese Status for Military Service

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(1)
zh-TW: 需填寫華僑身分證明申請書，若委託他人申請，則須加填委託書(委託人兩份都需親自簽名)
en-US: An application form for proof of overseas Chinese status must be completed. If someone else is applying on your behalf, a power of attorney must also be completed (both copies must be signed by the principal).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 備妥中華民國與居留國護照(不能用影本)，申請一次須工本費$200元新台幣
en-US: Prepare your Republic of China (Taiwan) and country of residence passports (photocopies are not acceptable). A processing fee of NT$200 is required for each application.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(1) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3)
zh-TW: 至僑委會臨櫃申請(行政院中央聯合辦公大樓南棟(台北市中正區徐州路5號)3F)，等待半天至一天工作日即可領取。
en-US: You can apply in person at the Overseas Community Affairs Council (South Building, Joint Central Government Office Building, Executive Yuan, 3F) and wait half a day to a full working day to collect your documents.

zh-TW: 至內政部移民署僑民役男申請出境文件審查平臺申請出境許可
en-US: Apply for an exit permit through the Exit Document Review Platform of the National Immigration Agency, Ministry of the Interior.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(1) a
.page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 登入需填寫役男身份證字號、出生日期及中華民國(臺灣)護照號碼
en-US: To log in, you need to fill in your conscript's ID number, date of birth, and Republic of China (Taiwan) passport number.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > span
zh-TW: 登入後選擇新增申請並填寫必要資訊：
en-US: After logging in, select "Add Application" and fill in the required information:

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(1)
.page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 僑民役男E-Mail(需填寫兩次，一次為確認)
en-US: Overseas Chinese conscripts' email address (must be filled out twice, once for confirmation)

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(3)
zh-TW: 僑民役男役政用華僑身分證明書(除須上傳可清楚辨識的照片外，亦須填寫有效期限)
en-US: Overseas Chinese Status Certificate (In addition to uploading a clearly identifiable photo, the validity period must also be filled in)

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(4)
zh-TW: 僑民役男中華民國護照及僑居國護照(除填寫編號外，亦須上傳可清楚辨識照片及填寫有效期限)
en-US: Overseas conscripts must upload their Republic of China passport and passport from their country of residence (in addition to filling in the passport number, a clearly identifiable photo and the expiration date are also required).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(5)
zh-TW: 僑民役男4個月內自僑居國出國的紀錄(最佳證明為自僑居地起飛的機票，且機票資訊必須要能清楚確認是僑民本人持有)
en-US: The overseas conscript's record of leaving the country of residence within the past 4 months (the best proof is a ticket departing from the country of residence, and the ticket information must clearly confirm that the overseas conscript is in possession of the ticket).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(6)
zh-TW: 申請後等待約一至兩個工作天後，可再次登入查詢申請結果(連絡電話：內政部役政司，02-85013928)
en-US: After submitting your application, you can log in again to check the results after approximately one to two business days (contact number: Ministry of the Interior, Conscription Department886-2-85013928).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(2) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-4 > li:nth-child(7)
zh-TW: 若僑民役男尚未建立兵籍資料，則需親自(視情況須由監護人陪伴)前往戶籍所在地戶政事務所辦理，完成後才能獲得出境許可
en-US: If a conscripted overseas Chinese has not yet established military service registration, he/she must personally (and may be accompanied by a guardian if necessary) go to the household registration office in his/her place of residence to complete the registration process before obtaining an exit permit.

zh-TW: 至內政部移民署各地服務站臨櫃申請出境核准
en-US: Apply for exit approval in person at any of the National Immigration Agency's service centers across the Ministry of the Interior.

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(1)
zh-TW: 須至服務站填寫申請書，若委託他人代理則須加填委任書(皆須本人親自簽名)，委任書須貼上委辦者身分證正反面影本(須自行影印)
en-US: You must fill out an application form at the service station. If you are authorizing someone else to act on your behalf, you must also fill out a power of attorney (both must be signed by the authorized person in person). The power of attorney must be accompanied by a photocopy of both sides of the authorized person's ID card (you must make the photocopy yourself).

id: .page-content .faq .content.conscript ol.list-level-1 > li:nth-of-type(3) > ol.list-level-2 > li:nth-child(3) > ol.list-level-3 > li:nth-child(2)
zh-TW: 申請時須攜帶僑民役男中華民國(臺灣)護照、僑居國護照及役政用華僑身分證明書，且必須自行影印身分證明頁與役政用華僑身分證明書
en-US: When applying, the applicant must bring their Republic of China (Taiwan) passport, their passport from their country of residence, and their overseas Chinese status certificate for conscription purposes. They must also make photocopies of their identity document page and the overseas Chinese status certificate for conscription purposes.

zh-TW: 僑民役男在通過出境核准後，會在中華民國(臺灣)護照上蓋出境核准證明印，於有效期限內可自由出入境中華民國自由地區(臺灣地區)。
en-US: After being approved for exit, overseas conscripts will have an exit approval stamp affixed to their Republic of China (Taiwan) passports, allowing them to freely enter and exit the free areas (Taiwan/Kinmen/Mazu(Lianjiang)) of the Republic of China (Taiwan) within the validity period.

zh-TW: 若出境核准證明過期，但役政用華僑身分證明書尚未過期，則可逕自內政部移民署各地服務站重新臨櫃申請出境核准。
en-US: If the exit permit has expired, but the overseas Chinese identity certificate for military service has not expired, you can apply for exit permit again in person at any of the National Immigration Agency's service centers.

zh-TW: 承辦單位可協助辦理申請，但請於活動開始前向承辦單位提出需求，活動正式開始後概不受理。
en-US: The organizer can assist with the application process, but please submit your request to the organizer before the event begins. Applications will not be accepted after the event has officially started.
Please refer to this flowchart for details:

zh-TW: 營隊規則簽名表格可以報到當天繳交，也可以先簽名後拍照上傳至雲端連結：[連結]
en-US: The camp rules signature form can be submitted on the day of registration, or you can sign it first, take a photo, and upload it to the cloud link:[Link]

zh-TW: 如怕護照證件遺失，可事先用手機拍照存檔或是影印紙本，萬一需要就醫時可以使用影本或臺灣健保卡，但如需辦理網卡(如有家長陪同可以辦完網卡後由家長收回)
en-US: If you are worried about losing your passport or other documents, you can take a photo of it with your phone beforehand or make a paper copy. In case you need to see a doctor, you can use the copy or your Taiwan National Health Insurance card. However, if you need to apply for a data card (if a parent accompanies you, the parent can collect the data card after it is processed), you can apply for a data card.

zh-TW: 除非需要大量購買臺灣名產，否則零用錢建議攜帶新臺幣1,000-2,000元即可，或是悠遊卡儲值1,000元，現金1,000元亦可。
en-US: Unless you need to buy a lot of Taiwanese specialties, it is recommended to carry NT$1,000-2,000 for spending money, or NT$1,000 in EasyCard or NT$1,000 in cash.

zh-TW: 因為報到後的晚上有些注意事項還要跟志工們說明，原則上不希望志工報到後離開臺北醫學大學，報到後我們有責任維護每位志工和工作人員的安全。
en-US: There are some precautions to take that need to be explained to the volunteers on the evening after they arrive. In principle, we do not want volunteers to leave Taipei Medical University after they arrive. We have a responsibility to protect the safety of every volunteer and staff member after they arrive.

zh-TW: 其實我們並不是要限制志工的行動或說是"管制"志工，畢竟志工來臺灣人生地不熟，加上我們有責任維護參加這個活動的每個人的安全，雖然臺灣的治安算很好，但不怕一萬只怕萬一，所以麻煩各位家長，協助主辦單位(僑務委員會)跟志工們說明，營隊期間的規則和要求都是為了活動順利和大家的安全，沒有工作人員帶領下請勿私自離開營隊活動區域，也切勿飲酒，就算年滿18歲也一樣(因為團體內還有很多未滿17歲的志工，擔心會有渲染效應...難以管理)，志工來臺是為了服務...為了增加生活經驗和學習，希望各位家長和志工能夠諒解，謝謝。
en-US: Actually, we don't intend to restrict or "control" the volunteers. After all, the volunteers are unfamiliar with Taiwan, and we have a responsibility to ensure the safety of everyone participating in this activity. Although Taiwan has a good public safety record, we're always prepared for the worst. Therefore, we ask all parents to assist the organizers (Overseas Chinese Affairs Commission) in explaining to the volunteers that the rules and requirements during the camp are for the smooth running of the event and everyone's safety. Please do not leave the camp activity area without the guidance of staff, and please do not drink alcohol, even if you are 18 years or older (because there are many volunteers under the age of 17 in the group, and we are worried about the potential for a negative impact... making them difficult to manage). The volunteers come to Taiwan to serve... to gain life experience and learn. We hope that all parents and volunteers can understand. Thank you.

zh-TW: 是否配戴口罩相關規定：臺灣新冠疫情警戒級別已經降級，大眾運輸及公共場所並無強制配戴口罩，若有個人因素考量，亦可以自行選擇是否配戴口罩，謝謝。
en-US: Regarding mask-wearing regulations: Taiwan's COVID-19 alert level has been downgraded, and wearing masks on public transportation and in public places is not mandatory. You may choose whether or not to wear a mask if you have personal considerations. Thank you.

zh-TW: 教學期間24小時客服專線

en-US: The Volunteer Recruitment Period is over.

zh-TW: 主辦單位：僑務委員會、教育部、客家委員會、原住民族委員會。
en-US: Organizer: Overseas Community Affairs Council, Ministry of Education, Hakka Affairs Council, Council of Indigenous Peoples

zh-TW: 承辦單位：嚕啦啦旅行社有限公司。
協辦單位：團隊鏈企管顧問公司。
招募單位：中國青年救國團、臺北醫學大學。
en-US: Recruiting Organization: China Youth Corps, Taipei Medical University

zh-TW: 報名人員應依規定期限填妥報名資料，並檢附相關文件(學生證影本及語文能力證明，以上網填寫報名表單或以電子郵件寄送方式予招募單位(中國青年救國團)辦理。
en-US: Applicants should complete the application form within the specified period and attach relevant documents (a copy of their student ID and proof of language proficiency). The application should be submitted online or by email to the recruiter (China Youth Corps).

id: .page-content .volunteer .information ol li:nth-child(5) ol li:nth-child(2) ol li:nth-child(1)
.page-content .volunteer .information ol li:nth-child(5) ol li:nth-child(2) ol li:nth-child(2)
.page-content .volunteer .information ol li:nth-child(5) ol li:nth-child(2) ol li:nth-child(3)
zh-TW: 語言能力證明(全民英檢達B1/TOEIC多益測驗550分/雅思 IELTS 4.5分/托福TOEFL iBT 75分 )同等以上為優先
en-US: Language proficiency certificates (B1 level in the General English Test Band 1/TOEIC score of 550/IELTS score of 4.5/TOEFL iBT score of 75) or equivalent will be given priority.

id: .page-content .volunteer .information ol li:nth-child(5) ol li:nth-child(2) ol li:nth-child(4)

zh-TW: ※以上證明文件影本(手機拍照檔亦可)請於報名時一起上傳。
en-US: ※Please upload copies of the above supporting documents (photos taken with a mobile phone are also acceptable) along with the registration.

zh-TW: 報名截止後，由招募單位(中國青年救國團)彙整報名資料，辦理後續審查、錄取及通知作業。
en-US: After the application deadline, the recruiting organization (China Youth Corps) will compile the application materials and handle the subsequent review, admission and notification procedures.

zh-TW: 報名期間：即日起至5月29日(星期五)截止。
mailto:090714@cyc.tw?subject=2026年海外青年英語服務營生活輔導員志工招募-姓名○○○
en-US: mailto:090714@cyc.tw?subject=English Teaching Volunteer Service Program for Overseas Youth 2026 - Volunteer Registration - Name: OOO
